summary: Frontend testing of POS stock availability display fix completed successfully. All 6 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POS page loads correctly with items displayed
Stock badge shows correct stock count for selected store (BELT shows 55 for Main Store)
Store availability section shows 'Available at:' with store names and quantities
Switching stores updates the stock badge correctly (55 → 15 when switching from Main Store to The Brand Mafia In Bus Stand)
Items with inventory in multiple stores show '+N' for additional stores (BELT shows +1 for third store)
Items with no inventory show 0 stock with red/amber badge (TEST_Verify_Product shows 0)
Items without inventory do NOT show 'Available at:' section (correct behavior)
Selected store's stock is highlighted in the availability section
Item cards with 0 stock are visually faded (opacity-50)
critical_code_review_comments: getStock function correctly falls back to first store when selectedStore is empty
getStoreAvailability correctly maps inventory to stores and sorts by quantity descending
Store availability section only renders when storeAvail.length > 0 (no empty sections)
Selected store is highlighted with primary color in availability badges
seed_data_creation: None - used existing BELT item with inventory in Main Store (55 units) and The Brand Mafia Opp Bus Stand (14 units)
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS stock availability display fix verified working. Key test items: BELT (has inventory in multiple stores), TEST_Verify_Product (no inventory - shows 0 stock). The fix correctly shows stock per store on item cards with 'Available at:' section.

pos_stock_display.stock_badge: WORKING - Shows correct stock count for selected store
pos_stock_display.store_availability_section: WORKING - Shows 'Available at:' with store names and quantities
pos_stock_display.store_switching: WORKING - Stock badge updates when switching stores
pos_stock_display.multiple_stores_indicator: WORKING - Shows '+N' for additional stores beyond first 2
pos_stock_display.zero_stock_display: WORKING - Items with no inventory show 0 with red badge
